economic_notes: First Nation owns one-seventh interest in South Beach Casino Limited Partnership (casino and hotel on Brokenhead Ojibway Nation land). Owns 51% of Hollow Water-WERI Construction Ltd. (construction company). Also has SIBI Development Corporation (Wanipigaa-Sibi Development Corporation). Partnership income from South Beach Casino was $1,373,700 in 2022.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to unavailability of accounting records for Hollow Water-WERI Construction Ltd. (51% owned). Consolidated entity includes: Band Administration, Health, Band Housing, Housing Authority, Wanipigaa-Sibi Development Corporation, and proportionate consolidation of Hollow Water-WERI Construction Ltd. South Beach Casino Limited Partnership accounted for by modified equity method (GBE). Budget information not provided — departure from PSA standards noted. Demand loan of $1,229,601 related to legal claim against Government of Canada. Note 21 shows total expenditures by object as $18,924,254 but Statement 2 shows $18,424,254 — a $500,000 variance noted in the statements. Capital projects segment revenue of $3,421,041 includes CMHC construction-in-progress of $1,277,182 for Women's Shelter completed September 2023. No schedule of remuneration included in the financial statements provided.
